title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, PwC India Global Group in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PwC India Global Group:
PwC India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India Global Group!
